nodes.name: I18nAutoConfigurationTests.java
nodes.summary: Integration test for I18nAutoConfiguration verifying that the Spring Boot auto-configuration registers all expected i18n beans including ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean, MessageSourceAdapter, and related post-processors.

nodes.name: I18nAutoConfigurationTests
nodes.summary: Test class that uses ApplicationContextRunner to validate the I18nAutoConfiguration registers all required i18n Spring beans.

nodes.name: shouldContainServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean
nodes.summary: Verifies that the auto-configured context contains all expected i18n beans including applicationServiceMessageSource, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, I18nApplicationListener, and bean post-processors.

nodes.name: EnableI18n.java
nodes.summary: Annotation that enables Spring i18n support by importing I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar, allowing configuration of message sources and optional MessageSource exposure through annotation attributes.
nodes.languageNotes: Creates a Spring @Import-driven annotation that bootstraps i18n bean registration.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar.java
nodes.summary: ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar that conditionally registers all i18n Spring beans (ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, lifecycle listeners, and conditional bean post-processors) when @EnableI18n is present and the i18n feature is enabled.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
nodes.summary: Central bean registrar that processes @EnableI18n attributes and conditionally registers ServiceMessageSource beans, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, I18nApplicationListener, and post-processors for validation and web locale resolution.

nodes.name: registerBeanDefinitions
nodes.summary: Main registration entry point that checks if i18n is enabled, then delegates to sub-methods to register ServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, I18nApplicationListener, and bean post-processor definitions.

nodes.name: registerServiceMessageSourceBeanDefinitions
nodes.summary: Resolves source names from annotation attributes and Spring properties, registers a ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean for each source, and creates a primary DelegatingServiceMessageSource bean that composites all source beans.

nodes.name: registerBeanPostProcessorBeanDefinitions
nodes.summary: Conditionally registers ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor, and optionally registers I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor and AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor based on classpath availability.

nodes.name: setEnvironment
nodes.summary: Injects the Spring Environment to enable property-based resolution of i18n source names and the enabled/disabled flag.

nodes.name: isEnabled
nodes.summary: Checks the 'microsphere.i18n.enabled' Spring property to determine whether i18n feature registration should proceed, defaulting to enabled.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor.java
nodes.summary: MergedBeanDefinitionPostProcessor that automatically configures init and destroy method names on ServiceMessageSource bean definitions, delegating to Spring's lifecycle interfaces when applicable.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor
nodes.summary: Post-processor that examines each merged bean definition for ServiceMessageSource types and assigns init/destroy method names if not already configured and the bean does not implement InitializingBean/DisposableBean.

nodes.name: postProcessMergedBeanDefinition
nodes.summary: Entry point for the MergedBeanDefinitionPostProcessor that checks if a bean definition is assignable to ServiceMessageSource and triggers init/destroy method name configuration.

nodes.name: setInitMethodName
nodes.summary: Sets the 'init' method name on the bean definition if the bean does not implement InitializingBean and no init method is already configured.

nodes.name: setDestroyMethodName
nodes.summary: Sets the 'destroy' method name on the bean definition if the bean does not implement DisposableBean and no destroy method is already configured, respecting Spring's INFER_METHOD convention.

nodes.name: I18nConstants.java
nodes.summary: Constants interface defining Spring configuration property names for the i18n framework including enabled flag, sources, default locale, supported locales, and the primary bean name.

nodes.name: I18nConstants
nodes.summary: Interface containing all Spring configuration property constants for i18n including enabled property, sources, default locale, and supported locales, documented with @ConfigurationProperty annotations.

nodes.name: I18nApplicationListener.java
nodes.summary: Application event listener that initializes the global ServiceMessageSource on context refresh, destroys it on context close, and reloads sources on property changes.

nodes.name: I18nApplicationListener
nodes.summary: Listens for ContextRefreshedEvent, ContextClosedEvent, and PropertySourcesChangedEvent to manage ServiceMessageSource lifecycle and reload i18n sources dynamically.

nodes.name: onContextRefreshedEvent
nodes.summary: Handles ContextRefreshedEvent by extracting the ApplicationContext and initializing the global ServiceMessageSource from it.

nodes.name: onContextClosedEvent
nodes.summary: Handles ContextClosedEvent by destroying the global ServiceMessageSource to clean up resources.

nodes.name: onPropertySourcesChangedEvent
nodes.summary: Handles PropertySourcesChangedEvent by reloading affected ServiceMessageSource instances whose configuration properties have changed.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapter.java
nodes.summary: Spring MessageSource adapter that delegates message resolution to a ServiceMessageSource and falls back to other MessageSource beans in the application context for default messages.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapter
nodes.summary: Implements Spring's MessageSource interface by wrapping a ServiceMessageSource and aggregating fallback MessageSource beans, with SmartInitializingSingleton for late binding of fallback sources.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapter
nodes.summary: Constructor accepting the ServiceMessageSource to wrap and initializing the fallback MessageSource list.

nodes.name: getMessage(code,args,defaultMessage,locale)
nodes.summary: Resolves a message by code from the ServiceMessageSource and falls back to default message sources if no message is found.

nodes.name: getMessage(resolvable,locale)
nodes.summary: Resolves a message from a MessageSourceResolvable by iterating through its message codes until a non-null message is found.

nodes.name: afterSingletonsInstantiated
nodes.summary: Collects all non-self MessageSource beans from the BeanFactory after all singletons are instantiated, building the fallback chain for default message resolution.

nodes.name: I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor.java
nodes.summary: BeanPostProcessor that associates the i18n MessageSourceAdapter with Spring's LocalValidatorFactoryBean to enable internationalized validation error messages.

nodes.name: I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor
nodes.summary: Extends GenericBeanPostProcessorAdapter to intercept LocalValidatorFactoryBean initialization and set the i18n MessageSourceAdapter as its validation message source.

nodes.name: isValidatorFactoryPresent
nodes.summary: Checks whether jakarta.validation.ValidatorFactory is on the classpath to conditionally enable validation i18n support.

nodes.name: AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor.java
nodes.summary: BeanPostProcessor that configures Spring MVC's AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver with the default locale and supported locales from the ServiceMessageSource configuration.

nodes.name: AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor
nodes.summary: Extends GenericBeanPostProcessorAdapter and ApplicationContextAware to inject i18n-configured default and supported locales into each AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver bean.

nodes.name: processAfterInitialization
nodes.summary: Post-processes an AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver by setting its default locale and supported locales from the ServiceMessageSource configuration.

nodes.name: isAcceptHeaderLocaleResolverPresent
nodes.summary: Checks whether AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver is on the classpath to conditionally enable web locale i18n support.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrarTest.java
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test for I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar covering source-specified, disabled, unexposed message source, and absent bean class scenarios in a Spring application context.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrarTest
nodes.summary: Test class with four test methods validating bean registration behavior under different @EnableI18n configurations including enabled, disabled, unexposed MessageSource, and absent validation/web classes.

nodes.name: testOnSpecifiedSources
nodes.summary: Verifies that when sources are specified, all expected i18n beans (ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean, MessageSourceAdapter, ServiceMessageSource, I18nApplicationListener, post-processors) are present in the context.

nodes.name: testOnDisabled
nodes.summary: Verifies that when i18n is disabled via configuration, none of the i18n beans are registered in the application context.

nodes.name: testOnUnexposedMessageSource
nodes.summary: Verifies that when exposeMessageSource is false, ServiceMessageSource beans are still registered but MessageSourceAdapter is not exposed as the Spring MessageSource.

nodes.name: testOnBeanClassAbsent
nodes.summary: Verifies that when validation and web classes are not on the classpath, the conditional post-processors (I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor, AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor) are not registered.

nodes.name: DisabledEnableI18nConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Test configuration class annotated with @EnableI18n and a ResourcePropertySource that sets microsphere.i18n.enabled=false, used to verify the disabled behavior of i18n bean registration.

nodes.name: UnexposedMessageSourceEnableI18nConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Test configuration class annotated with @EnableI18n(exposeMessageSource = false) used to verify i18n bean registration without exposing the MessageSourceAdapter as the Spring MessageSource.

nodes.name: I18NLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessorTest.java
nodes.summary: Test for I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor covering scenarios without LocalValidatorFactoryBean, without MessageSourceAdapter, and verifying that the message interpolator is set correctly.

nodes.name: I18NLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessorTest
nodes.summary: Test class validating the I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor behavior when LocalValidatorFactoryBean is absent, MessageSourceAdapter is not available, and when both are present and correctly wired.
